title: When AI does the work, who does the learning?
summary_en: AI is rapidly reshaping education, but not always in ways that support learning. A growing number of AI tools promise to вАЬhelpвАЭ students by doing assignments, writing papers, solving problem sets, or even completing exams¬†automatically.

title: How well can your institution recover from a ransomware attack?
summary_en: Most educational institutions believe theyвАЩre prepared for a cyberattack. Perhaps theyвАЩre running backups, and an incident response plan exists somewhere on the shared drive. Maybe they have a cyber insurance policy in place, or have run a tabletop exercise or two.
